scope: Operational runbook for the offline-only Level B validation track, to be executed before any offline consolidation or pre-runtime evolution.
principles: Do not touch runner, runtime, retrieval, router, corpus or bridge applicativo.
Treat the Golden Baseline Pack as a non-negotiable benchmark separate from ordinary tests.
Use the Release Gate Offline only after the ordered execution of required suites.
Do not interpret, validate, conclude or close M07-LPR from Level B.
Audit trail and SHADOW remain structurally mandatory on critical paths.
Any critical regression leads to hold or suspension before commit or tag.
The final methodological GO/NO-GO remains exclusive to Level A.

execution_order.title: Verify repository hygiene
execution_order.success_condition: Working tree clean or only explicitly admitted local artifacts already ignored.

execution_order.title: Verify offline baseline assets
execution_order.success_condition: Golden baseline files, release gate files, schemas and helper modules all present.

execution_order.title: Run Level B critical suites in recommended order
execution_order.success_condition: All required offline suites pass, with golden baseline green.

execution_order.title: Execute Release Gate Offline
execution_order.success_condition: Gate returns GO and writes the structured report.

execution_order.title: Review gate report and reasons
execution_order.success_condition: Operator verifies that no HOLD/SUSPEND/ERROR reasons remain unresolved.

execution_order.title: Perform local housekeeping
execution_order.success_condition: No untracked or transient files unrelated to the cantiere remain in the worktree.

execution_order.title: Consolidate by commit and tag
execution_order.success_condition: Commit and tag are created only after the runbook path is fully green.

operator_must_verify: No critical suite failure reason remains.
The result does not bypass Level A final governance.

forbidden_mix: Do not include runner federato changes inside the offline Level B cantiere.
Do not tag if the release gate decision is not GO.
Do not commit transient local reports as stable artifacts.

allowed_without_new_version: Editorial clarifications in the markdown runbook that do not alter execution semantics.
Stable examples in artifacts that do not change operational rules.
require_new_version: Any change to accepted or hold gate decisions.
Any change to stop conditions or freeze policy.

freeze_policy.freeze_trigger: The runbook is frozen once preflight helper, checklist, tests and document converge on the same ordered execution semantics.
review_before_change: Check consistency with the fondativo v2 and master v2.
Check consistency with the Golden Baseline Pack and Release Gate Offline.
Confirm no runtime or runner scope expansion is introduced.

stop_conditions: Working tree not clean on files relevant to the cantiere.
Release Gate Offline returns SUSPEND or ERROR.
An intended change leaks into runner, runtime, retrieval, router, corpus or bridge applicativo.
A proposed change gives Level B conclusive, certificative or decision-making semantics.
